scripts.build:client: npm run build:tools && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-web-runtime build && node dist-tools/scripts/build-client.js
scripts.build:server: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-web-runtime build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.serve: npm run build && node bin/kfc-session.js serve
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:tools && node dist-tools/test/run.js
